title: Langeweile SMP 4
description: Adds new landscapes across all dimensions and a few extra items!
body:
# 🏞️ Langeweile SMP 4 – Modpack
A world full of new adventures, landscapes, and possibilities!

Langeweile SMP 4 is a carefully selected Fabric modpack designed to enhance Minecraft’s world generation and gameplay while keeping the vanilla spirit alive.
Explore brand-new landscapes in all dimensions, discover new structures, biomes, and dungeons, and enjoy quality-of-life improvements that make exploration and survival even more fun.

## 🌍 Features

🌿 New world generation – unique terrain and biomes in the Overworld, Nether, and End.

🏕️ Adventure-ready gameplay – backpack systems, teleportation stones, new equipment and more.

🔊 Enhanced immersion – realistic sounds, animations, and lighting effects.

⚒️ QoL improvements – automatic crop harvesting, better trading, and configurable settings.

🧩 Optimized for servers – perfect for SMPs or small friend groups.

📦 Included Mods (Selection)

Waystones, Traveler’s Backpack, RightClickHarvest

Terralith, Incendium, Nullscape (custom terrain)

Simple Voice Chat (optional)

Presence Footsteps, Sound Physics, Dynamic Lights

Villager Trading Plus and more

## ⚙️ Requirements

Minecraft: 1.21.8

Modloader: Fabric

Recommended: 6GB+ RAM

## 🧭 How to Install

Install the Fabric Loader
.

Download this modpack from Modrinth.

Launch via your favorite mod manager (e.g. Prism Launcher, MultiMC, or Modrinth App).

## 🤝 Multiplayer

You can play this pack in singleplayer or on a Fabric server.
Some mods are client-only (like Presence Footsteps, Dynamic Lights, Sound Physics) and don’t need to be installed on the server.

## 💬 Description

Explore a new world full of life and mystery.
This pack transforms every dimension into a fresh adventure — with new terrain, biomes, and items waiting to be discovered.
Perfect for players who want a beautiful, exploration-focused SMP without losing the vanilla Minecraft feeling.
